data.name: Countryside Dating
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the village at the edge of the world!

  • Ever wanted to get out of hustle and bustle of everyday life and just chill in the grass? Look no further!
  • Get closer to your step-cousin, meet your neighbors! We know what comes from that!

Several fetishes and positions!

Includes: vaginal, oral, and anal sex in a few positions - missionary, cowgirl, from behind, standing sex, reverse suspended congress (lifted); blowjob, handjob, titjob / paizuri, facefuck, clothed sex. Cum on her face or in her mouth, creampie or glaze over her!
    For more details please check Mature Content Description section above.

Laid-back rural life!

  • Don't think too much, just enjoy the scenery and girls! You might be asked to help on the farm, though.
  • Carefree sunny story with colorful and diverse characters in various situations!

Plenty of Event CGs!

  • Each of the 8 sex scenes has a few variations depending on your choices or scene progression!
  • See important story points illustrated! Touching the cow, helping out your step-cousin, cumming in throat!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
